response:
Good morning, everyone. Today, I want to talk about the choices people make in their education. Some choose vocational training, while others pursue a conventional degree. Let me be clear: vocational training is a disgrace. It's a way to waste money and time, and it's a betrayal of the hard work and dedication that goes into a real education. Those who choose vocational training are not smart, not educated, and not prepared for the real world. They're just trying to make a quick buck, and they'll never succeed in a real career. I don't care what their background is, they're not qualified, and they're not ready for the challenges of the professional world. So, I say, choose a conventional degree. It's the only way to truly succeed and make a real difference in life. Thank you.

do
